subject: Spliting a data-job into sub-jobs forward those to dmi
commit_message:
Spliting a data-job into sub-jobs forward those to dmi

    - algorithm for create sub-job requests
    - added new method to DmiServiceUrlBuilder to get the write job url

Issue-ID: CPS-2142
Change-Id: I2a647badb6b8aae85724e3c3b291f8f4b91b6ee1
Signed-off-by: leventecsanyi <levente.csanyi@est.tech>
